analysis: The project is a black hole themed website with existing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The current theme includes cosmic and dark elements, but it lacks specific enhancements for animated objects and slides related to black holes. The CSS file needs to be updated to include full animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file requires a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon. The JavaScript file has syntax errors and incomplete functions that need to be fixed and completed.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
